# Law Office of David Friedman, PLLC

## Identity
- **Name:** Law Office of David Friedman, PLLC
- **Type:** Consumer Protection Law Firm
- **Location:** White Plains, NY (Serving NY & MN)
- **Focus:** FCRA (Credit Reporting), FDCPA (Debt Collection), RESPA (Mortgage Servicing), Bankruptcy Litigation
- **Attorney:** David Friedman, Esq.

## Core Services (Practice Areas)
- **Mortgage Errors & Servicing Abuse:** Disputes regarding payment misapplication, escrow errors, and Regulation X violations.
- **Credit Reporting Errors & Identity Theft:** Fixing mixed files, identity theft, and background check errors (FCRA).
- **Debt Collection Harassment & Rights:** Stopping harassment, zombie debt, and illegal garnishments (FDCPA).
- **Payment App Fraud & Bank Errors:** Recovering funds from Zelle scams, unauthorized debits, and frozen accounts (EFTA).
- **Bankruptcy Rights Violations:** Adversary proceedings, discharge violations, and Rule 3002.1 enforcement.

## Key Resources
- /#/practice/mortgage: Mortgage Errors & Servicing Abuse
- /#/practice/credit: Credit Reporting Errors & Identity Theft
- /#/practice/debt: Debt Collection Harassment & Rights
- /#/practice/fintech: Payment App Fraud & Bank Errors
- /#/practice/bankruptcy: Bankruptcy Rights Violations
- /#/resource/mortgage-math-chapter-13: When the Mortgage Math Doesn't Add Up
- /#/resource/credit-reporting-after-bankruptcy: Cleaning up After Bankruptcy
- /#/resource/debt-collection-after-bankruptcy: Debt collection after bankruptcy

## Contact
- **Phone:** (914) 222-3612
- **Email:** david@davidfriedmanlaw.com
- **Intake:** /#/intake

## Mission
To provide high-leverage technical litigation for consumers facing systemic financial errors. We specialize in federal statutory claims that shift the cost of litigation to the banks and bureaus.
